## Project Summary
This is a modern personal portfolio website featuring:
- Responsive design with mobile navigation
- Hero section with gradient background
- About section for personal introduction
- Animated skills section with progress bars
- Projects showcase with grid layout
- Contact form with client-side validation

## How to View
Simply open index.html in your browser, or use the "Open Portfolio in Browser" task from VS Code's task runner.

## Next Steps
1. Customize content in index.html with your personal information
2. Update skills and projects with your own work
3. Modify colors in css/styles.css if desired
4. Connect contact form to a backend service if needed
